home.title: Monorepo Template
home.subtitle: Next.js + NestJS + worker, ready to start a new project.
home.serverCardDesc: Data fetched on the server during render.
home.clientCardDesc: Data fetched in the browser after load.

server.title: Server side
server.description: This page is a Server Component. It fetches the API health check on the server while rendering. The result is part of the HTML, with no loading state.

client.title: Client side
client.description: This page is a Client Component. It fetches the API health check from the browser through a proxy route.
client.idle: Press the button to call the API.
